title: chrony bug fix and enhancement update
overview: An update for Oracle Linux is now available for Oracle Linux 10.
description:
[4.6.1-2.0.1]
- Fixed chrony starting before network-online service [Orabug: 36813717]
- Change chrony.conf to use pool.ntp.org [Orabug: 28627760]
- Fix chronyd.service md5sum

[4.6.1-2]
- improve description of refresh directive (RHEL-91788)
- improve logging of selection failures (RHEL-91787 RHEL-91789 RHEL-91791)
- fix sourcedir reloading to not multiply sources (RHEL-95017)
full_text:
[4.6.1-2.0.1]
- Fixed chrony starting before network-online service [Orabug: 36813717]
- Change chrony.conf to use pool.ntp.org [Orabug: 28627760]
- Fix chronyd.service md5sum

[4.6.1-2]
- improve description of refresh directive (RHEL-91788)
- improve logging of selection failures (RHEL-91787 RHEL-91789 RHEL-91791)
- fix sourcedir reloading to not multiply sources (RHEL-95017)

References:
https://linux.oracle.com/errata/ELBA-2025-20158-0.html
